nasb.text: “Son of man, say to Pharaoh king of Egypt and to his hordes, ‘Whom are you like in your greatness?

esv.text: “Son of man, say to Pharaoh king of Egypt and to his multitude: “Whom are you like in your greatness?

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要對埃及王法老和他的眾民說： ‘論到你的偉大，誰能與你相比呢？

ccb.text: “人子啊，你要对埃及王法老和他的百姓说， “‘谁能比你强大呢？
